```{r}
# =======================
# PACKAGES
# =======================
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(pracma)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(tidyr)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# INPUT / OUTPUT
# =======================
file <- "input_files/coating_pre_incubation.csv"
out_dir <- "output/growth_assays/coating_pre_incubation"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# =======================
# HELPER FUNCTION:
# use lm() for 1 experiment, lmer() for >1 experiments
# =======================
fit_model_by_experiment <- function(formula_fixed, data, experiment_col = "Experiment") {
  n_exp <- dplyr::n_distinct(data[[experiment_col]])
  
  if (n_exp <= 1) {
    fit <- lm(formula_fixed, data = data)
    model_type <- "lm"
  } else {
    form_lmer <- as.formula(
      paste0(deparse(formula_fixed), " + (1 | ", experiment_col, ")")
    )
    fit <- lmer(form_lmer, data = data)
    model_type <- "lmer"
  }
  
  list(model = fit, model_type = model_type, n_exp = n_exp)
}
```

```{r}
# =======================
# READ DATA
# Required columns:
#   Condition   (seeding, coating, pre_incubation)
#   Draxin      (0 or 140)
#   Experiment
#   Replicate
#   Hr or Hour
#   Count
# =======================
df_raw <- read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE)

if ("Hr" %in% names(df_raw) && !("Hour" %in% names(df_raw))) {
  df_raw <- df_raw %>% rename(Hour = Hr)
}

required_cols <- c("Condition", "Draxin", "Experiment", "Replicate", "Hour", "Count")
missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(df_raw))

if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
}
```

```{r}
# =======================
# CLEAN DATA
# =======================
condition_order <- c("seeding", "coating", "pre_incubation")

df <- df_raw %>%
  mutate(
    Condition  = str_trim(as.character(Condition)),
    Draxin     = str_trim(as.character(Draxin)),
    Experiment = factor(as.character(Experiment)),
    Replicate  = factor(as.character(Replicate)),
    Hour       = as.numeric(Hour),
    Count      = as.numeric(Count)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Condition),
    !is.na(Draxin),
    !is.na(Experiment),
    !is.na(Replicate),
    !is.na(Hour),
    !is.na(Count)
  )

condition_order_present <- condition_order[condition_order %in% unique(df$Condition)]
if (length(condition_order_present) == 0) {
  condition_order_present <- sort(unique(df$Condition))
}

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Condition = factor(Condition, levels = condition_order_present),
    Draxin = factor(Draxin, levels = c("0", "140"))
  )

if (!("0" %in% levels(df$Draxin)) || !("140" %in% levels(df$Draxin))) {
  stop("Draxin column must contain both '0' and '140'.")
}
```

```{r}

# =======================
# INPUT SANITY CHECKS
# =======================
write.csv(
  data.frame(column_name = names(df)),
  file.path(out_dir, "input_column_names.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  data.frame(
    column_name = names(df),
    n_unique = sapply(df, dplyr::n_distinct)
  ),
  file.path(out_dir, "input_n_unique_per_column.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

curve_summary <- df %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Replicate, Condition, Draxin) %>%
  summarise(
    n_timepoints = n(),
    min_hour = min(Hour, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_hour = max(Hour, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_count = mean(Count, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_count = sd(Count, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(
  curve_summary,
  file.path(out_dir, "count_summary_per_curve.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

dup_check <- df %>%
  count(Experiment, Replicate, Condition, Draxin, Hour) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

write.csv(
  dup_check,
  file.path(out_dir, "duplicate_timepoints_check.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("\n=======================\n")
cat("INPUT DATA SUMMARY\n")
cat("=======================\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(df), "\n")
cat("Experiments:", paste(unique(df$Experiment), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Conditions:", paste(levels(df$Condition), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Draxin:", paste(levels(df$Draxin), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Hours:", paste(sort(unique(df$Hour)), collapse = ", "), "\n\n")

print(df %>% count(Condition, Draxin))
```

```{r}
# =======================
# NORMALIZE TO BASELINE
# within each Experiment x Replicate x Condition x Draxin
# =======================
df_norm <- df %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Replicate, Condition, Draxin) %>%
  arrange(Hour, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    baseline_hr = first(Hour),
    baseline_count = first(Count),
    Count_norm = Count / baseline_count
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Count_norm),
    is.finite(Count_norm),
    baseline_count > 0
  )

write.csv(
  df_norm,
  file.path(out_dir, "normalized_timecourse.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# PLOT SUMMARIES
# =======================
df_plot_raw <- df %>%
  group_by(Condition, Draxin, Hour) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_count = mean(Count, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_count = sd(Count, na.rm = TRUE),
    sem_count = sd_count / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

df_plot_norm <- df_norm %>%
  group_by(Condition, Draxin, Hour) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_norm = mean(Count_norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_norm = sd(Count_norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    sem_norm = sd_norm / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(
  df_plot_raw,
  file.path(out_dir, "raw_timecourse_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  df_plot_norm,
  file.path(out_dir, "normalized_timecourse_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# =======================
# PLOT RAW
# =======================
p_raw <- ggplot(df_plot_raw, aes(x = Hour, y = mean_count, color = Draxin, group = Draxin)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_count - sem_count, ymax = mean_count + sem_count),
    width = 2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Condition, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Raw growth curves",
    x = "Time (h)",
    y = "Cell count",
    color = "Draxin"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13)

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "raw_growth_curves_mean_sem.png"), p_raw, width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "raw_growth_curves_mean_sem.pdf"), p_raw, width = 10, height = 5)

# =======================
# PLOT NORMALIZED
# =======================
p_norm <- ggplot(df_plot_norm, aes(x = Hour, y = mean_norm, color = Draxin, group = Draxin)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_norm - sem_norm, ymax = mean_norm + sem_norm),
    width = 2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Condition, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Normalized growth curves",
    x = "Time (h)",
    y = "Cell count normalized to baseline",
    color = "Draxin"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13)

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "normalized_growth_curves_mean_sem.png"), p_norm, width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "normalized_growth_curves_mean_sem.pdf"), p_norm, width = 10, height = 5)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# AUC PER CURVE
# =======================
df_auc <- df_norm %>%
  arrange(Experiment, Replicate, Condition, Draxin, Hour) %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Replicate, Condition, Draxin) %>%
  summarise(
    n_timepoints = n(),
    AUC_norm = if (n() >= 2) trapz(Hour, Count_norm) else NA_real_,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(AUC_norm))

write.csv(
  df_auc,
  file.path(out_dir, "auc_normalized_by_replicate.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# =======================
# SLOPE PER CURVE
# =======================
df_slope <- df_norm %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Replicate, Condition, Draxin) %>%
  arrange(Hour, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  summarise(
    n_timepoints = n(),
    slope = if (n() >= 2) coef(lm(Count_norm ~ Hour))[2] else NA_real_,
    intercept = if (n() >= 2) coef(lm(Count_norm ~ Hour))[1] else NA_real_,
    r_squared = if (n() >= 2) summary(lm(Count_norm ~ Hour))$r.squared else NA_real_,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(slope))

write.csv(
  df_slope,
  file.path(out_dir, "trend_slope_by_replicate.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# =======================
# AUC MODEL
# compare Draxin within each Condition
# =======================
if (nrow(df_auc) >= 4) {
  fit_auc <- fit_model_by_experiment(AUC_norm ~ Condition * Draxin, df_auc)
  m_auc <- fit_auc$model
  
  anova_auc <- anova(m_auc)
  emm_auc <- emmeans(m_auc, ~ Draxin | Condition)
  posthoc_auc <- contrast(emm_auc, method = "revpairwise", adjust = "BH")
  
  write.csv(as.data.frame(anova_auc), file.path(out_dir, "auc_model_anova.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
  write.csv(as.data.frame(emm_auc), file.path(out_dir, "auc_emmeans_draxin_within_condition.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(as.data.frame(posthoc_auc), file.path(out_dir, "auc_draxin_140_vs_0_within_condition.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}

# =======================
# SLOPE MODEL
# =======================
if (nrow(df_slope) >= 4) {
  fit_slope <- fit_model_by_experiment(slope ~ Condition * Draxin, df_slope)
  m_slope <- fit_slope$model
  
  anova_slope <- anova(m_slope)
  emm_slope <- emmeans(m_slope, ~ Draxin | Condition)
  posthoc_slope <- contrast(emm_slope, method = "revpairwise", adjust = "BH")
  
  write.csv(as.data.frame(anova_slope), file.path(out_dir, "slope_model_anova.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
  write.csv(as.data.frame(emm_slope), file.path(out_dir, "slope_emmeans_draxin_within_condition.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(as.data.frame(posthoc_slope), file.path(out_dir, "slope_draxin_140_vs_0_within_condition.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
# =======================
# FULL TIMECOURSE MODEL
# =======================
if (nrow(df_norm) >= 6) {
  n_exp <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_norm$Experiment)
  
  if (n_exp <= 1) {
    m_time <- lm(Count_norm ~ Hour * Condition * Draxin, data = df_norm)
  } else {
    m_time <- lmer(
      Count_norm ~ Hour * Condition * Draxin + (1 | Experiment) + (1 | Experiment:Replicate),
      data = df_norm
    )
  }
  
  anova_time <- anova(m_time)
  emtr <- emtrends(m_time, ~ Draxin | Condition, var = "Hour")
  posthoc_trend <- contrast(emtr, method = "revpairwise", adjust = "BH")
  
  write.csv(as.data.frame(anova_time), file.path(out_dir, "timecourse_model_anova.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
  write.csv(as.data.frame(emtr), file.path(out_dir, "timecourse_emtrends_draxin_within_condition.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(as.data.frame(posthoc_trend), file.path(out_dir, "timecourse_trend_draxin_140_vs_0_within_condition.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}

# =======================
# TIMEPOINT-SPECIFIC STATS
# compare Draxin within each Condition at each hour
# =======================
df_norm_tp <- df_norm %>%
  mutate(Hour_f = factor(Hour, levels = sort(unique(Hour))))

if (nrow(df_norm_tp) >= 6) {
  n_exp <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_norm_tp$Experiment)
  
  if (n_exp <= 1) {
    m_time_tp <- lm(Count_norm ~ Condition * Draxin * Hour_f, data = df_norm_tp)
  } else {
    m_time_tp <- lmer(
      Count_norm ~ Condition * Draxin * Hour_f + (1 | Experiment) + (1 | Experiment:Replicate),
      data = df_norm_tp
    )
  }
  
  emm_time <- emmeans(m_time_tp, ~ Draxin | Condition + Hour_f)
  contrast_time <- contrast(emm_time, method = "revpairwise", adjust = "BH")
  
  results_time <- as.data.frame(contrast_time) %>%
    mutate(Hour = as.numeric(as.character(Hour_f)))
  
  write.csv(
    results_time,
    file.path(out_dir, "timepoint_specific_draxin_140_vs_0_within_condition_BH.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
  first_sig_time <- results_time %>%
    mutate(
      Hour = as.numeric(Hour),
      p.value = as.numeric(p.value)
    ) %>%
    group_by(Condition) %>%
    arrange(Hour, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    summarise(
      first_sig_hour = if (any(p.value < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)) min(Hour[p.value < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
      first_sig_p = if (any(p.value < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)) p.value[match(first_sig_hour, Hour)] else NA_real_,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  write.csv(
    first_sig_time,
    file.path(out_dir, "first_significant_timepoint_per_condition.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
}
```

```{r}
# =======================
# 24 h ATTACHMENT ANALYSIS
# RAW COUNTS
# =======================
df_24 <- df %>%
  filter(Hour == 24)

write.csv(
  df_24,
  file.path(out_dir, "raw_24h_values.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

df_24_summary <- df_24 %>%
  group_by(Condition, Draxin) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_count = mean(Count, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_count = sd(Count, na.rm = TRUE),
    sem_count = sd_count / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(
  df_24_summary,
  file.path(out_dir, "raw_24h_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

p_24_raw <- ggplot(df_24, aes(x = Draxin, y = Count)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_point(
    data = df_24_summary,
    aes(x = Draxin, y = mean_count),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = df_24_summary,
    aes(x = Draxin, ymin = mean_count - sem_count, ymax = mean_count + sem_count),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Condition, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "24 h attachment analysis (raw counts)",
    x = "Draxin",
    y = "Cell count at 24 h"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13)

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "raw_24h_attachment_by_condition.png"), p_24_raw, width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "raw_24h_attachment_by_condition.pdf"), p_24_raw, width = 10, height = 5)

# =======================
# 24 h NORMALIZED TO
# condition-matched Draxin 0 mean
# within each Experiment x Condition
# =======================
df_24_norm_ctrl <- df_24 %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Condition) %>%
  mutate(
    ctrl_mean_24 = mean(Count[Draxin == "0"], na.rm = TRUE),
    Count_24_norm_to_ctrl = Count / ctrl_mean_24
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(ctrl_mean_24),
    is.finite(ctrl_mean_24),
    ctrl_mean_24 > 0,
    is.finite(Count_24_norm_to_ctrl)
  )

write.csv(
  df_24_norm_ctrl,
  file.path(out_dir, "raw_24h_normalized_to_condition_ctrl.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

df_24_norm_summary <- df_24_norm_ctrl %>%
  group_by(Condition, Draxin) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_norm = mean(Count_24_norm_to_ctrl, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_norm = sd(Count_24_norm_to_ctrl, na.rm = TRUE),
    sem_norm = sd_norm / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(
  df_24_norm_summary,
  file.path(out_dir, "raw_24h_normalized_to_condition_ctrl_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

p_24_norm <- ggplot(df_24_norm_ctrl, aes(x = Draxin, y = Count_24_norm_to_ctrl)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_point(
    data = df_24_norm_summary,
    aes(x = Draxin, y = mean_norm),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = df_24_norm_summary,
    aes(x = Draxin, ymin = mean_norm - sem_norm, ymax = mean_norm + sem_norm),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Condition, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "24 h attachment normalized to condition-matched Draxin 0",
    x = "Draxin",
    y = "Cell count at 24 h / mean Draxin 0"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13)

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "raw_24h_normalized_to_condition_ctrl.png"), p_24_norm, width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "raw_24h_normalized_to_condition_ctrl.pdf"), p_24_norm, width = 10, height = 5)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# 24 h RAW MODEL
# =======================
if (nrow(df_24) >= 4) {
  fit_24_raw <- fit_model_by_experiment(Count ~ Condition * Draxin, df_24)
  m_24_raw <- fit_24_raw$model
  
  anova_24_raw <- anova(m_24_raw)
  emm_24_raw <- emmeans(m_24_raw, ~ Draxin | Condition)
  posthoc_24_raw <- contrast(emm_24_raw, method = "revpairwise", adjust = "BH")
  
  write.csv(as.data.frame(anova_24_raw), file.path(out_dir, "24h_raw_model_anova.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
  write.csv(as.data.frame(emm_24_raw), file.path(out_dir, "24h_raw_emmeans_draxin_within_condition.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(as.data.frame(posthoc_24_raw), file.path(out_dir, "24h_raw_draxin_140_vs_0_within_condition.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}

# =======================
# 24 h NORMALIZED MODEL
# =======================
if (nrow(df_24_norm_ctrl) >= 4) {
  fit_24_norm <- fit_model_by_experiment(Count_24_norm_to_ctrl ~ Condition * Draxin, df_24_norm_ctrl)
  m_24_norm <- fit_24_norm$model
  
  anova_24_norm <- anova(m_24_norm)
  emm_24_norm <- emmeans(m_24_norm, ~ Draxin | Condition)
  posthoc_24_norm <- contrast(emm_24_norm, method = "revpairwise", adjust = "BH")
  
  write.csv(as.data.frame(anova_24_norm), file.path(out_dir, "24h_normalized_model_anova.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
  write.csv(as.data.frame(emm_24_norm), file.path(out_dir, "24h_normalized_emmeans_draxin_within_condition.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(as.data.frame(posthoc_24_norm), file.path(out_dir, "24h_normalized_draxin_140_vs_0_within_condition.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}

cat("Done.\n")
```
